package rulefixtures

// scenario for unnecessary_slice_copy_for_readonly: `copy := append([]T(nil), original...)` when `copy` is only read, never mutated
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule692NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario692Negative(records []Rule692NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
